text:

a AMD64 architecture on release-8.1 final, on Core 2 Quad Q9550 2.83ghz,

RAM, 1000W power, MB Asus P5N32-E SLI, sound: Sound Blaster X - Fi -
Platinum Fatal1ty Champion, I have tested everything (and also how work
with other OS's), computer it's a new but no answer everything is ok,
I don't have a problems on a laptop or other machines?
